steps.title: Find the yearly multiplier
steps.content:
A yearly decrease of $2.5\%$ means the population keeps
$$
100\%-2.5\%=97.5\%
$$
As a decimal, this multiplier is $0.975$.

steps.title: Count the elapsed years
steps.content: From $2008$ to $2018$ is $10$ years. Starting with $7.84$ quail per mile, apply the multiplier $10$ times: $$ 7.84(0.975)^{10} $$ The answer is D.
